description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build sakura that runs on push and pull request events for master, feature/*, and release/* branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should use a windows-latest job with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release configurations across Win32 and x64 platforms. It should check out the code, set up MSBuild, build the solution, install Locale Emulator, build HTML Help, create an installer with Inno Setup, zip artifacts, and upload them.
